[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person sits on tiled stair steps while posing in front of a metal railing in an indoor stairwell.

Main Subject:
A person is seated partway down a staircase, holding a hand near their face while looking downward toward the camera. They wear a light-colored baseball cap with a dark emblem on the front, a black long-sleeve top with a large white graphic across the chest and arms, light gray pants, and black-and-white sneakers. A thin chain necklace is visible around their neck.

Setting:
The scene is indoors in a stairwell with beige or light gray walls. The stairs have gray steps with lighter edges or strips along the risers and treads. Black metal railings curve along the left side and run across the right side of the frame.

Visual Details:
The camera angle looks downward from above, showing the person centered among the steps. Lighting appears soft and even, with no visible sunlight; the image has a slightly cool, muted tone. The cap’s front emblem is dark and prominent, the shirt’s white graphic contrasts strongly against the black fabric, and the pants are loose-fitting. The person’s pose includes one hand raised near the face and the other hand near the lap, with one knee bent and the body angled slightly to one side.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a person posing while seated on an indoor staircase. They wear a light cap, a black graphic sweatshirt, gray pants, and black-and-white sneakers beside a curved metal railing.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

No readable text is visible in the screenshot.

# Structured Version

- **Text detected:** None (no legible UI labels, captions, or printed text present)
- **Other visible elements:** Photo of a person on stairs (no extractable text)

# Notes

- The image appears to contain no readable letters/numbers besides a hat logo that is not clearly legible as text. If you want, upload a closer crop of the hat/logo area for text extraction.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person sits on a concrete spiral staircase, holding the brim of a white New York Yankees baseball cap. They are wearing a black zip-up hoodie with a repeated white silhouette pattern of figures in various poses, a simple silver chain necklace, and loose-fitting grey jeans. Their feet are clad in black and white sneakers with thick white laces. The staircase has grey concrete steps with white tile edging and is framed by a black metal railing. The background wall is a textured, off-white color with some peeling paint. The lighting is dim and atmospheric, casting soft shadows and creating a slightly moody, urban feel. The overall color palette is dominated by muted greys, black, and white, with hints of the skin tone of the person visible. The style is casual, streetwear-inspired, and somewhat edgy.
